description: Generate a summary note for any directory in your vault. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Vahid F.
manifest.description: Generate a summary note for any directory in your vault.
manifest.name: Directory Summary

name: Directory Summary

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New features in patch
- New setting to specify file/directory name patterns to ignore in the generated summary file

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Patch Notes
- Update setting caption
- Remove default title property

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# New feature in this release: 
- New setting to specify a file property name. When specified the list item generated in the summary will have a checkbox like so `- [ ] ...`.
- New setting to specify a regex for the above file property. If the regex matches the property value, the checkbox will be checked (`- [X] ...`), otherwise it will remain unchecked (`- [ ] ...`). 
- Add a Github workflow for release management and generating artifact attestations.

releases.author: va9id
releases.description: Initial release of my plugin Directory Summary which creates a summary of a directory in your note. Refer to the README of the repository for more information on the usage.
releases.name: Initial Release v1.0.0
